title: adesmia frigida
intro: Adesmia frigida, also known as the "Itoh's pea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub that grows up to 1.5 meters tall, producing white flowers and small, brown pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Adesmia frigida include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water.
